raw.objective: “to confirm the expectation that perampanel has no perpetrator effects on other AEDs, and this was addressed via population-based modelling of data”
raw.covariates: Tested: CBZ daily dose, comedication with other AEDs (and PRMP) on CL Included: CBZ daily dose, comedication with VPA and PRMP on CL
raw.observations: Perampanel has a small statistically relevant, yet clinically irrelevant (<5%) impact on CBZ CL. Due to the focus on comedication, WT and age were not included as covariates.
raw.equations: if(OCC==1) et1=exp(eta1) if(OCC==2) et1=exp(eta1+eta2) CL/F=(theta1+theta2*CBZD+theta3*VPA+theta4*PRMPD)*et1 Cobs=(R0/(CL/F))*(1+eps1) #reasonable assumptions were made on the manner in which covariates, IIV and IOV were described, as this information was not provided in the paper nor its supplement R0 is the total daily CBZ dose per 24 hours CBZD: daily dose of CBZ in mg/day PRMPD: daily perampanel dose in mg/day VPA: comedication with valproic acid (1: yes, 0: no) SEX: gender (female: 0, male: 1)

extraction_target.title: Impact of perampanel on pharmacokinetics of concomitant antiepileptics in patients with partial-onset seizures: pooled analysis of clinical trials.

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending
Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

sigma.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

covariates: comedication with VPA and PRMP on CL
extraction_target.residual_error: if(OCC==1) et1=exp(eta1) if(OCC==2) et1=exp(eta1+eta2) CL/F=(theta1+theta2*CBZD+theta3*VPA+theta4*PRMPD)*et1 Cobs=(R0/(CL/F))*(1+eps1) #reasonable assumptions were made on the manner in which covariates, IIV and IOV were described, as this information was not provided in the paper nor its supplement R0 is the total daily CBZ dose per 24 hours CBZD: daily dose of CBZ in mg/day PRMPD: daily perampanel dose in mg/day VPA: comedication with valproic acid (1: yes, 0: no) SEX: gender (female: 0, male: 1)
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.objective: “to confirm the expectation that perampanel has no perpetrator effects on other AEDs, and this was addressed via population-based modelling of data”

tested: comedication with other AEDs (and PRMP) on CL
included: comedication with VPA and PRMP on CL
covariates.raw: Tested: CBZ daily dose, comedication with other AEDs (and PRMP) on CL Included: CBZ daily dose, comedication with VPA and PRMP on CL

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
